jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Toppr
jsonLd.description:
Toppr, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Visakhapatnam operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Toppr:
Toppr is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Toppr!
